name: Spinach (Korean Sigumchi Namul)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach thoroughly.
2. Steam until just tender and still green, then strain and squeeze out as much water as possible.
3. Cut the spinach very coarsely.
4. Combine soy sauce, sesame oil, sesame seeds, garlic, sugar, vinegar, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Mix the seasoning into the chopped spinach.
Variation: Season the spinach with Chang (meat sauce for vegetables).
